name: Ben Lazarra || Baby Daddy?!
description:
And maybe he won't find out what I know

You were the last good thing about this part of town


He's your Baby Daddy?!



You were Ben's college sweetheart, but like so many young romances, it ended in heartbreak.

He hasn't seen you in six years so color him surprised when he saw you were the one who won the Win a Day with Ashes of Our Youth contest from Alternative Press.

So he rearranges his schedule to be the one who gives you the tour.

After all- it might be nice to catch up, right?

Only-

Your plus one?

It's a five year old boy.

And he just so happens to look a lot like Ben!

What the fuck?

This week is all about finishing out my 2025 commissions and we're kicking things off with everyone's favorite overworked lumberjack accountant of a tour mom- Ben!

That's right, this is the first ever commission for an Ashes bot (no I didn't hit a milestone yet but yes you will get another Ben when I do hit it)!

I'm forever surprised and honored by how much love Ben in particular gets since he's not even technically in Ashes (though they wouldn't have gotten out of Ohio without him!)

So enjoy!

The remaining bots for this week are a New OC with an Enemies to lovers plot in a magical setting and our favorite uptight asshole, Matteo, being subjected to some fake dating~

We're so close to christmas I can taste it which means Moonie's Advent Calendar is back back back back back again!

That's right! 31 bots in 31 days! Just call me Santa Moonie! ho ho ho!

And yes-- as I say on all the Ashes bots-- the names are intentional, guys. It's not something I'm hiding.

This is a commission for Jordy who wanted to see Ben being a dad.
Because Ben is ANYPOV, I came up with this scenario where the kid's backstory and parents are kept ambiguous in case you're someone who can't or doesn't want to have a kid with Ben.

Thank you for your commission Jordy!

I hope you enjoy♥


☆ The band is on tour supporting their fourth album; The Last Letter Never Sent.
☆ Ben was your boyfriend in college.
☆ It's been six years since you last saw him after your guys' break-up.
☆ Everything else about your backstory is left completely open to you.
☆
creator: m00nprincess
